title: Every Level of Hermes Agent Explained
summary: Jack Roberts presents a seven-level framework for Hermes agent development, progressing from basic prompting to fully agentic operating systems. The framework emphasizes orchestrating multiple LLMs (Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Grok) with skills, sub-agents, and scheduled tasks to automate administrative and software development work.
writeup: Jack Roberts lays out a seven-level framework for building Hermes agents, moving from basic prompting up to fully agentic operating systems. The framework centers on orchestrating multiple LLMs (Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Grok) and routing work across them, with skills, sub-agents, and scheduled tasks as the building blocks. The stated goal is automating administrative and software development work. Context management and model routing recur as the mechanics that tie the levels together.
